bull_points: Freeze authority is revoked, reducing one authority-based risk.
Liquidity is present at $12,000 with $4,000 1h volume, so the market is not completely inactive.
bear_points: Mint authority is not revoked and LP is not burned/locked, both hard safety concerns.
RugCheck trust is only 30/100 with HIGH risk.
Top 10 holders control 55.0%, largest wallet holds 22.0%, dev holds 9.0%, and sniper share is 30.0%.
Buy/sell ratio is 0.70, indicating weak buy pressure.
Social data is missing, increasing uncertainty.
rationale: The safety profile fails on multiple hard red lines, and holder/sniper concentration is materially concerning. Momentum is not strong enough to offset the HIGH risk score, unlocked LP, active mint authority, and missing social data.

workflow.note: Mint authority not revoked, LP not burned/locked, trust 30/100, risk HIGH.
Top10 55.0%, largest wallet 22.0%, dev 9.0%, sniper 30.0%, holders only 80.
Liquidity $12,000 and 1h volume $4,000 exist, but buy/sell ratio 0.70 and FDV/liquidity 15.00 are weak.
Social data is unavailable, so confidence is reduced and no social strength is assumed.
Bull case is only partly data-backed because freeze is revoked and liquidity exists, but bear case is strongly supported by safety failures, concentration, and missing social.
